title: Colly Collectors, Callback Order, Limits, Storage, and Adoption Boundaries
description: The code moves directly to Colly, mutates collector callbacks concurrently, enables Async without Wait, trusts IgnoreRobotsTxt defaults, and loses the hand-built policy model. Learners cumulatively produce policy-preserving Colly adapter and decision record through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Map Collector creation, callback registration, Visit, Request, Async, Wait, error, and close-related ownership into the application lifecycle.
Translate allowed domains, depth, body size, redirects, robots, rate limits, revisit, and user agent from owned policy and verify gaps.
Keep callbacks thin, order-independent where required, concurrency-safe, context-rich, and delegated to testable application services.
